item.title: NYT Connections Hints Today (#1065)—Answers for Monday, May 11
item.content:encoded:
Welcome to an entirely new week, and you know what that means, right? You’ve got seven new chances to push that NYT Connections streak further than ever! If you’re new here, then make sure you bookmark the site to get the best NYT Connections hints delivered daily.

For now, scroll down to get today’s NYT Connections answers and tips in a matter of seconds!

How to Play NYT Connections

In June 2023, NYT Connections emerged as yet another game in the ever-growing lineup of the New York Times titles. This title soared immediately, and it’s easy to see why. As a free-to-play, accessible New York Times game, NYT Connections is available worldwide and can be played on desktop devices or in a mobile app.

But how do you play NYT Connections?

The NYT team will provide you with a grid of 16 words once a day. The only task left up to you is to sort those words into four groups of four by finding their commonalities. Every NYT Connections puzzle has just one solution, and some words can have double meanings, so it can sometimes be tricky to figure out the answers.

It’s also important to stress that the words are color-coded: yellow, blue, green, and purple. That’s in order of difficulty, from least to most.

What’s critical here is that you get four guesses every day, and if you use those, your NYT Connections answers for today will be out of reach, as it’ll be game over.

Today’s NYT Connections Hints (May 11)

Here are the words for today’s NYT Connections:

  • COLOR
  • CREEP
  • SHANDY
  • KARMA
  • KNIVES OUT
  • SLIP
  • PYRAMID
  • RHYME
  • STEAL
  • CHINATOWN
  • KEYED
  • SNEAK
  • SEVEN
  • PONZI
  • ELEGY
  • VERTIGO

And here are the hints I can offer for today’s NYT Connections:

  • Yellow – Ways to move around stealthily
  • Green – Words you’d associate with kinds of schemes
  • Blue – Names of popular detective flicks
  • Purple – The middle of these words represents body parts

Here’s the final warning before we get to the NYT Connections answers for today, May 11:

Are you sure you want to scroll further?

Very well!

NYT Connections Answers Explained for Today, May 11 (#1065)

If you want to jump straight to the answers for today’s NYT Connections puzzle, I’ve got you covered:

  • Yellow – CREEP, SLIP, SNEAK, STEAL
  • Green – COLOR, PONZI, PYRAMID, RHYME
  • Blue – CHINATOWN, KNIVES OUT, SEVEN, VERTIGO
  • Purple – ELEGY, KARMA, KEYED, SHANDY

When Does NYT Connections Reset?

That’s today’s puzzle, but if you want the next one, the game resets daily at midnight local time (that’s your local time). You’ll have 24 hours to complete the puzzle when midnight ticks over in your timezone.

How did you do? Did you get a perfect run? Let me know what your streak looks like on the Insider Gaming Discord server

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/nyt-connections-hints-solutions-may-11-1065/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Epic Says AI Won’t Replace Jobs, But Increase Efficiency
item.content:encoded:
Epic Games comments on the company’s use and experimentation with AI technology. AI isn’t just a major talking point in the video game space; businesses across the board are rushing to be at the forefront of the race to optimize for AI. In the video game industry, Epic is the latest publisher touting how excited they are about the new tech.

Speed and optimization are the focal points of the latest comments from a Fortnite executive at a recent conference. Don’t worry, they are sure to say that AI isn’t coming to kill jobs; it’s simply being brought on board to optimize efficiency.

Stephanie Arnette is a senior external development manager on Fortnite, and during a recent Gamescom Latam panel, she spoke about how the company has been exploring different automated tools to increase efficiency.

“Epic has been exploring different AI tooling that we can use to help support our games,” Arnette said (h/t: GamesRadar+). “I know everyone’s biggest fear is, ‘Oh my god, AI is going to take all our jobs.’ That’s not our goal. The goal is to make us more efficient.”

She would also go on to suggest that something that would take an individual 10 hours to do might suddenly take less time, and noted that AI tooling is being explored in the art realm as well. However, she did not elaborate on how.

Arnette would go on to confidently state that Epic is leaving the charge of whatever AI is implemented into Fortnite, saying, “There really is no opening for a partner to try to put their AI info or tooling into ours, because it’s such a massive, massive company, so it would always be from our direction outward, and not the other way around.”

Recently, Sony executives also bragged about how AI was the future of game development. They are currently working with Bandai Namco in the realm of generative AI. Learn more about that here.

Sound off about this story and all others in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Nintendo Promises Strong Switch 2 Lineup After Price Increase
item.content:encoded:
Nintendo’s president, Shuntaro Furukawa, recently commented on the price hike for the Nintendo Switch 2 and his hopes to address the issue by bolstering the platform’s game lineup. During its latest financial earnings release, Nintendo revealed that it intends to raise the price of the Switch 2. Starting in September, Switch 2 consoles will cost an extra $50 in the United States. Markets in Asia are also being hit with an increase in the Nintendo Switch Online membership prices.

Nintendo executives are once again apologizing for the inconvenience that this may cause consumers. However, they also say they plan to load up the Switch 2 lineup to give players more value.

Nintendo Hopes New Switch 2 Games Offset Rising Console Costs

During a recent investor call, Nintendo president Shuntaro Furukawa announced that the company will prepare a “robust” software lineup to overcome the pricing barrier. However, regarding the pricing barrier, he also stated that the new pricing doesn’t fully account for all cost increases.

“We sincerely apologize to our customers for the considerable inconvenience and trouble this will cause,” he said (as translated by Nintendo Patents Watch on Bluesky Social). “While we wanted to prioritize a wide adoption, it was challenging to bear the rising costs over a long period. The [new] pricing does not fully account for all cost increases.”

So what could be coming as part of the robust lineup? Well, there is a “new” Star Fox game on the way. It is an updated take on Star Fox 64, however. Players are patiently waiting for the expected Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake. Also, there has been no official word from Nintendo on when the next 3-D Mario will be released. Prominent leaker NateTheHate recently stated that gamers shouldn’t expect that title until 2027. Speaking of 2027, that is when the generation 10 Pokémon games, pokémon wind and Pokémon Waves, will be released.

Already released are strong games in the Donkey Kong series and Pokémon Pokopia. Pokopia has sold millions of copies so far. Third-party games such as Resident Evil Requiem are also bolstering the console’s lineup.

For more information on the planned price increases, click here. Insider Gaming will continue to monitor the story and report any updates as more information becomes available.

What do you hope to see come to the Nintendo Switch 2 in the near future?

MOBILE APP

item.title: WWE Sponsorship Could Hint at Gears of War: E-Day Launch
item.content:encoded:
Gears of War: E-Day is sponsoring a major professional wrestling event in September. While nothing is certain, this could provide a hint at the game’s release window.

During WWE Backlash on May 9, it was announced that AAA Triplemania, the biggest show of the year for WWE’s Lucha Libre promotion in Mexico, would be taking place on September 11 and September 13. Additionally, it was announced that Gears of War: E-Day would be a presenting sponsor of the events. Again, this isn’t a definitive sign that the game will be available by the time the event goes on the air in September, but in the past, WWE would only have video game sponsors for events releasing around the time of the event.

This is also not the first time WWE has partnered up with Gears of War. Kofi Kingston, Big E Langston, and Xavier Woods, collectively known as The New Day, were playable characters in Gears of War 5. WWE has also partnered with Fortnite and other video games in the past.

TRIPLEMANÍA por primera ocasión será un evento de DOS NOCHES 💥 11 y 13 de septiembre de 2026 Para más información regístrate en wwe.com/triplemania34

While there is no definitive release date for the next Gears of War game, a presentation focused on it is scheduled for June. Since 2024, no significant gameplay footage has been revealed. The game was initially announced at the 2024 Xbox Showcase in June, where only a cinematic trailer was shown. The upcoming presentation will be held on June 7, immediately following an Xbox showcase. It was recently revealed that the event would present about 30 minutes of new footage.

“I’ll say that we’ve got the Gears Direct coming, and after seeing that, we’ve probably got like a full 30 minutes, which is really great. I don’t know. I just love everybody in that studio, the work they’re doing. I’m excited about the game, and we’re going to have a fantastic, full 30 minutes of stuff to see,” Xbox CCO Matt Booty proclaimed in a recent interview.

Insider Gaming will continue to monitor the story and report any updates as more information becomes available. For more WWE video game-related news, check out the locker codes for the month of May in WWE 2K26.

Are you excited for Gears of War: E-Day? Do you think there will be more crossovers between WWE and the Gears of War franchise? Sound off about this story and all others in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP
